     3	function buildSelectedClipsPrompt(
     4	  selectedClips: SelectedClipPayload[] | undefined,
     5	  timelineSummary: string,
     6	): string {
     7	  if (!selectedClips?.length) {
     8	    return "";
     9	  }

    11	  const timelineLines = timelineSummary.split("\n");

    18	      : `- ${clip.clip_id} (${clip.media_type}, ${clip.url})`;
    19	  });
